hero.title: CPUNK
hero.subtitle_line3: Building the tools for a sovereign digital future.
community.label: The Community
community.title: By the people, for the people
community.desc: CPUNK is not a company — it's a movement. Everything is built, governed, and owned by the community.
community.privacy.title: Privacy
community.privacy.desc: Your data belongs to you. No tracking, no surveillance, no compromise. Privacy is a right, not a feature.
community.quantum.title: Quantum Safety
community.quantum.desc: Built on post-quantum cryptography. Secured today against tomorrow's quantum computers.
community.decentralization.title: Decentralization
community.decentralization.desc: No central authority, no single point of failure. The network is owned and operated by its community.
community.governance.title: Governance
community.governance.desc: Propose and vote on ecosystem changes through CIPs. Every voice counts, every vote matters.
token.label: The Token
token.title: One token. Real utility. Community owned.
token.desc: $CPUNK powers the entire ecosystem — from DAO governance and on-chain voting to DNA identity registration and in-app transfers. Integrated natively into DNA Connect, it's the fuel behind every action in the network. Fair-launched, hard-capped, and owned by the community. No insiders, no gatekeepers — just a movement you can be part of.
token.quantum.title: Quantum Safe
token.quantum.desc: CF20 token on Cellframe — NIST Category 5 post-quantum cryptography. ML-KEM-1024, ML-DSA-87, SHA-3-512.
token.fairlaunch.title: Fair Launch
token.fairlaunch.desc: 10 public DEX orders over 5 weeks. No private rounds, no seed investors. Equal access for everyone.
token.supply.desc: Fixed supply. No minting, no hidden unlocks, no inflation. What exists is all there will ever be.
token.zeroinflation.title: Zero Inflation
token.zeroinflation.desc: No emission schedule, no unlocks, no dilution. Your share stays your share — forever.
dna.label: DNA Connect
dna.title: Three utilities, one app
dna.desc: DNA Connect combines post-quantum messaging, a multi-chain wallet, and decentralized identity into a single client — no phone numbers, no central servers, no compromises.
dna.messaging.title: Messaging
dna.messaging.desc: Post-quantum encrypted conversations over a fully decentralized network. No central servers, no metadata. Offline messages wait in distributed mailboxes until you come back online.
dna.wallet.title: Multi-Chain Wallet
dna.wallet.desc: Manage multiple wallets directly inside the app. Send and receive tokens within any conversation — no need to switch apps or copy-paste addresses.
dna.identity.title: Decentralized Identity
dna.identity.desc: Your DNA name is your identity — tied to a cryptographic key pair, not to a phone number or email. Register once and be reachable across the entire network.
downloads.label: Downloads
downloads.title: Get DNA Connect
downloads.desc: Encrypted messaging, multi-chain wallet, and decentralized identity — one app, three platforms.
cta.title: One Community, One Vision.
cta.text: Download DNA Connect, join the conversation, and find a piece of the project you want to improve. Every meaningful contributor once started as a community member.
footer.copyright: © 2026 DNA Protocol — Privacy, Quantum Safety, Decentralization.
